subject: Automating tenant requests at CFL Property Management
body:
Hi,

I was looking at CFL Property Management's site and noticed you manage properties across a huge area of Central Florida, from Altamonte Springs to Kissimmee and beyond.

With that many properties, I'm guessing tenant maintenance requests take up a big chunk of your team's time. We help property managers automate the intake and routing of maintenance requests, so tenants submit through a simple form, it gets categorized and sent to the right vendor, and everyone gets status updates automatically.

Worth a 10-minute call this week to see if this could help?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Basic website with standard contact form
